  • Aries energy: acts first, thinks later, regrets… maybe.
VERDICT: RIDE OR DIE. JUST DON'T STEAL HIS SPOTLIGHT.

  • Needs a hug, a nap and a protein shake.

Turns any moment into a core memory. Expert in making bad decisions look iconic. Overthinks everything, but always ends up exactly where she's meant to be.

SARCASM
4/5
RISK OF CULT ABDUCTION
* Would join for the aesthetic… might stay.
5/5
ABILITY TO MAKE BAD DECISIONS
* Olympic level.
5/5

* Natural caretaker. Soft heart, strong boundaries.
4/5

* Usually right, but chooses peace.
2/5
CLASSIFIED NOTES ⚠
  • Overthinks. Overplans. Overachieves.
  • High standards. Higher intuition.
  • Protects her people like a lioness.
  • Loyal to the core, but won't hesitate to cut off what no longer serves her.
  • Romantic at heart, realist in practice.
  • Dreams big, works hard, parties harder.
  • Manifesting a life that feels like freedom.
VERDICT: BEAUTIFULLY CHAOTIC. LOYAL TO THE CORE. BUILT DIFFERENT. BORN TO LEAD, MEANT TO BE LOVED.
